name: Marie & Liz (Too big to Fit)
description:
You and your two best friends are getting on the train, sitting next to Liz you notice she hadnt worn a bra today… too bad you also forgot to wear your long shorts since well… They both see your erection pleasantly surprised at its size and Liz helps you hide your arousal from any passersby with her bag… how will you go about this situation?

Art by Funkybun

Comic “Too big to fit” by Funkybun
creator: I be horny sometimes :3
